1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px grid canvas with horizontal data stretching configuration)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Split Layout Split-Pane Splitter (Top Row: Balanced Ledger Filter Controls & Financial Period Toggle Matrix; Bottom-Left: Double-Entry Transaction Data Stream Table; Bottom-Right: High-Precision Transaction Creation Worksheet Panel & JSON Dimensional Payload Validator Workspace)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains double-entry worksheet open on right side while parsing ledger rows on left side)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Worksheet panel transitions to full overlay drawer toggled via dedicated creation buttons)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify valid financial period token -> Extract current tracking dimensions state mapping schemas -> Execute state fetch from UniversalLedgerService.getJournalEntries()
user_progression_routes.on_submit_success: Emit journal validation token event -> Auto-refresh transaction history tables -> Clear balanced workspace input rows back to standard defaults

redirection_rules.condition: If ledger financial period context parameter evaluates to locked or closed state
redirection_rules.action: Disable transactional inputs across worksheet container layer completely and show inline banner alert with status 'Read-Only Period Profile Active'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Slide out explicit 500px wide code visualization module layout pane containing high-contrast key-value fields mapping operational tracking dimensions metadata context strings

atoms.type: Tabular Numeric Entry Input Component Box
Tabular Numeric Entry Input Component Box
Conditional Color Element Token Status Node

molecules.composition: Combines account code drop-down picker selector + high-precision numeric debit input box + high-precision numeric credit input box + tracking tag text field input array configuration grouping components
events: onChange: trigger calculations analyzing worksheet row debit and credit value differentials

molecules.composition: Combines total calculated debit label + total calculated credit label + calculated variance delta numeric value text box + conditional tracking status indicator node element

organisms.composition: Dynamically adding row arrays item elements tracking multiple matching balanced journal line vectors, complete with interactive line deletion commands and ledger validation mechanism.

High-density multi-column row listing tracking operational metrics including unique entry id tokens, source modules tracking parameters, functional balances, tracking tags JSON blobs, and chronological timestamp data strings.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace (Strictly enforced font engine configuration across accounting tables to secure structural vertical decimal row alignment markers)

scales.summary_total_values: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | tracking: tight numeric spacing
scales.table_row_metadata_tags: font-size: 0.75rem (12px) | font-weight: 400 | color: slate muted tones

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Dark Mode Environment Base Frame Layout Grid)
color_palette_hex.worksheet_surface_elevation: #111827 (Dark Charcoal Control Layer Element Sheet Background Panel)
color_palette_hex.debit_positive_glint: #10B981 (Emerald Green Balanced Metric Highlight Border Text Tone)
color_palette_hex.credit_negative_neutral: #64748B (Slate Gray Standard Typography Base Allocation Line Content)
color_palette_hex.error_imbalance_glow: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Mismatch Indicator Tracking State Accent Glow Outline)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 0.75rem (12px compact spacing patterns for transaction layout structures)
spacing_and_borders.worksheet_row_gap: 0.5rem (8px grid spacing boundaries dividing consecutive line entry rows)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Separators)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: border-color transition changes to #3B82F6 using 100ms timing window; auto-select internal string components contents instantly on user entry action
border outline border-color updates to #EF4444 signaling broken arithmetic rules inside matching components layers

accessibility_aria_roles.double_entry_transactional_creation_canv: role='form' parsing accounting inputs validation structures
accessibility_aria_roles.ledger_balancing_summary_bar: role='status' wrapping live updates analyzing debit credit balancing variance math variables using explicit aria-live='polite' configuration properties

local_reactive_state_variables.worksheet_active_rows_collection: Reactive array layer parsing operational balance input line configurations currently active in user views [array of objects matching accounting inputs parameters structures]
local_reactive_state_variables.calculated_running_debit_total: High-precision internal calculation variable tracking added value properties across active debit entry input structures (numeric value initialized to 0.00)
local_reactive_state_variables.calculated_running_credit_total: High-precision internal calculation variable tracking added value properties across active credit entry input structures (numeric value initialized to 0.00)
local_reactive_state_variables.selected_inspect_entry_pointer: Tracks single nested object reference pointer for targeting full structured tracking dimensions data payload inside sidebar inspect drawers [object reference | null]

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared enterprise system operational scope parameter configuring active transactional tenant domains tracking filters (string layout initialization parameter)
global_application_context_bindings.system_active_currency_token: Global functional currency configuration identifier default context tracking values ('USD')

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 execution scope coupled to standard Tailwind CSS class definitions with responsive positioning parameters logic engines written in modular modern ES6 functional syntax structures featuring explicit BigInt/Decimal conversion abstractions to safeguard calculations against primitive floating-point rounding errors
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Calculated balancing summary matrix bar rows values metrics must trigger updates instantly matching typing interaction input updates without micro-stuttering typing experiences or blocking runtime thread operations arrays

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Set state tracking variable selected_inspect_entry_pointer values to target row record elements payload metadata context configurations, then open drawer_json_dimension_inspector workspace canvas overlays
Append empty row allocation node template element into worksheet_active_rows_collection state arrays to generate supplementary matrix input forms fields dynamically

Perform arithmetic evaluation confirming validation parameters state metric equals zero; append posted record matrix return structures back into tracking logs universal_posted_journal_records data state arrays cache layers; flush entry worksheets collections elements parameters clean

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /finance/ledger (Triggers transition routing back to Screen 1 Workspace Command Center Canvas View)
